subsystems.summary: Wave 1 native menu ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Wave 1 native message/text ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Battle has native runtime ownership, editor inspection/preview surfaces, schema and migration contracts, diagnostics, runtime VFX baseline, and closure signoff approved for the claimed Wave 1 scope.

Save/data runtime, recovery, migration, inspection, policy editing, RPG Maker MV/MZ binary save loading, and end-to-end compat save import into native runtime-owned state are landed and closure signoff is approved for the claimed Wave 1 scope.

Compat bridge exit is closed for the bounded import, validation, migration, diagnostics, and verification scope. Public compat registries under runtimes/compat_js now have no PARTIAL method-status markers, failure and successful live QuickJS plugin execution diagnostics/export parity are covered, and the closure signoff is approved for the claimed bridge-exit scope.

Presentation runtime, bridge, compiled spatial editor panels, end-to-end authoring-to-runtime proof path, release validation harness, bounded real renderer-backed production-path proof, shell-owned MapScene/MenuScene plus BattleScene actor-cue proof through the top-level EngineShell loop, deterministic non-OpenGL headless/reference capture breadth, phase-one shell-owned Map/Battle/Title/Options/LevelBuilder permutation goldens, a registered standalone profile_arena target, concrete ProfileArenaHotReloader with arena-reset lifecycle, presentation schema + migration proof fixture, and command-stream replay + reload determinism tests are landed. The claimed phase-one presentation scope passed ctest --preset dev-snapshot --output-on-failure and .\tools\ci\run_presentation_gate.ps1.

Gameplay ability runtime, inspector/editor surfaces, structured diagnostics snapshot, end-to-end release-grade tests, closure signoff artifact, gameplay_ability JSON schema (S24-T01), compat-to-native MZ mapper with deterministic fallback payloads (S24-T02), live BattleScene activation, AbilityBattleQueue integration into BattleFlowController (S24-T03/T04), deterministic AbilityTask WaitInput/WaitEvent/WaitProjectileCollision backends, bounded active-condition evaluation, authored battle/map task-graph runtime sequencing, branch/parallel/cancel diagnostics, script-task rejection, schema examples, and AbilityOrchestrationPanel author/preview/save/load/apply/revert workflow are landed for the claimed phase-two scope.

Governance foundation enforces release-signoff completeness for READY subsystem claims through ProjectAudit, release-readiness checks, truth reconciliation, canonical signoff artifacts, reviewer/date/verification/result/docs-alignment metadata, and diagnostics parity.

Character identity runtime, editor creator panel, character creation rules, bounded validation runtime, ECS component/system integration, deterministic spawner, preset-based runtime creator screen, preview card surface, runtime-created protagonist save/load persistence, layered portrait/field/battle composition, promoted asset-library appearance-part selection, creator-supplied portrait/field/battle import rows, governed promotion paths, attribution diagnostics, and part-library accept/reject/archive/assign management snapshots are landed with schema and focused tests.
mainGaps: Character identity validator, governance script, ProjectAudit artifact section, bounded runtime creator screen, preview card surface, and reusable CharacterCreationRules runtime are landed for the current editor/runtime contract.

Creation rules now enforce background/origin/species restrictions, free-text naming limits, class appearance restrictions, and stat allocation budgets; runtime-created protagonist save/load persistence is landed with editor save diagnostics and schema proof.
Layered portrait/field/battle composition is landed through CharacterAppearanceComposition with editor preview snapshots, schema, fixture, and focused tests.

Promoted appearance-part selection is landed through AssetLibrary action rows, CharacterCreatorModel appearance part rows, persisted portrait/field/battle/layered asset ids, disabled reasons for non-runtime-ready assets, schema fields, and focused tests.

Creator-supplied portrait/field/battle appearance part import tooling is landed through AssetImportSession appearance-part rows, governed promotion manifests rooted under the promoted asset library, source metadata, dimensions, attribution state, blocked reasons, explicit RPG Maker field/battle category mapping, and focused C++/Python tests.

Part-library management is landed through deterministic import preview, accept, reject, archive, assign, validation diagnostics, persisted identity assignment, runtime preview composition, and focused CharacterCreatorModel/CharacterCreatorPanel tests. Final-quality portrait art and cohesive character art direction remain asset-content backlog, not engine readiness blockers.

subsystems.summary: Achievement registry with progress tracking, unlock conditions, trigger parsing, event-bus auto-unlock, editor panel, vendor-neutral trophy export payload, platform backend synchronization, packaged AchievementPlatformProfile application, shared provider-profile status validation, and AchievementPanel external-service diagnostics is landed for the claimed Phase 7 scope. Proprietary store SDK credentials remain project configuration, not engine readiness work.

Accessibility auditor with missing-label, focus-order, contrast, navigation rules, live editor adapters, renderer-derived WYSIWYG contrast ingestion, and release top-level panel contrast coverage evidence is landed for the claimed Phase 5 scope.

Visual regression harness with golden file management, diff heatmaps, approval tooling, a file-backed executable harness gate, backend-selectable capture entry points, OpenGL capture, deterministic HeadlessRenderer/reference capture, backend metadata with stable hashes, command-stream parity assertions, and phase-one shell-owned MapScene, BattleScene, RuntimeTitleScene, RuntimeOptionsScene, and Level Builder permutation goldens is landed. The claimed phase-one visual scope passed ctest --preset dev-snapshot --output-on-failure and .\tools\ci\run_presentation_gate.ps1.

Audio mix preset bank with default profiles, category volume mapping, ducking rules, editor panel, validator governance, live AudioCore backend smoke diagnostics, deterministic backend/device matrix evidence, muted release fallback diagnostics, and AudioMixPanel matrix exposure is landed for the claimed Phase 5 scope.

Platform-specific export validator with per-target requirement checking, fixture-backed validation coverage, PowerShell CI script with JSON output, canonical urpg_pack_cli entrypoint, diagnostics panel with post-export artifact surfacing, bounded real Windows/Web/Linux/macOS bootstrap paths, bundle-level lightweight RLE-plus-XOR payload protection plus keyed integrity-tag validation, configured project-asset auto-discovery manifest staging, raw/source/external-store discovery rejection diagnostics, missing attribution and unresolved LFS pointer enforcement, bounded repo-owned content bundling for readiness/schema/level-library roots, governed manifest-driven promoted-asset bundle staging support, keyed SHA-256 bundle-signature validation, runtime/load-time bundle rejection, release-profile signing/notarization/artifact-policy enforcement, temp-file-plus-atomic-rename publication, and structured bundle-summary JSON reporting are landed.

Mod registry with manifest registration, dependency resolution, load-order topology, bounded validation runtime, sandboxed QuickJS activation, deterministic reload, polling hot-load, editor manager panel hot-load event log, local mod-store catalog install, ModMarketplaceProviderProfile validation, and ModManagerPanel provider diagnostics is landed for the claimed Phase 7 scope. External marketplace services, payments, reviews, and proprietary platform publishing remain project configuration.

Opt-in analytics dispatcher with deterministic tick counters, event buffering, circular drop, local and remote telemetry upload, reviewed endpoint profiles, editor panel, bounded validator/governance coverage, AnalyticsEndpointProfile status validation, and AnalyticsPanel provider diagnostics is landed for the claimed Phase 7 engine scope. Qualified production privacy/legal approval remains separate from engine readiness and is recorded as release-owner-waived in docs/release/LEGAL_REVIEW_SIGNOFF.md.
